Code fragment: public final TableField<UserRecord, String> USER_ID = createField("user_id", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.VARCHAR(64).nullable(false).defaultValue(org.jooq.impl.DSL.inline("", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.VARCHAR)), this, "用户id");
Explanation: The USER_ID column uses an empty string as a default value instead of NULL to represent missing values, which can lead to confusion between intentionally empty values and missing data. Consider removing the default value and allowing NULL, or use a meaningful default value if the column should never be NULL.

Code fragment: public final TableField<UserRoleRecord, String> ROLE_ID = createField("role_id", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.VARCHAR(200), this, "权限id");
Explanation: The ROLE_ID column is marked as NULLABLE but represents a role identifier in a user-role association table, which should never be NULL in practice since a user-role mapping without a role is meaningless. Consider adding a NOT NULL constraint to this column.
